relations.note: Restricts the gradient choice specifically for top_matter mastheads containing the logo mark.
Defines the physical layout rules for applying the approved gradients.

quotes: ### Gradient Specifications (approved set — never invent gradients)

rules.intent: Maintain brand visual consistency and color integrity across all gradients.
rules.rule_text: Only the approved set of gradients must be used for backgrounds, waves, and mastheads: Brand Blue to Dark Navy (#00529b to #011E45), Sky Blue to Deep Blue (#358CCB to #003D74), Sunshine to 75% Gold (#faa31b to Gold @75%), Golden Sand to White to Light Blue (#FEF1C8 to #ffffff to #E6F0F9), Golden Sand to 75% Gold to Sunshine (#FEF1C8 to Gold @75% to #faa31b), and Sunshine to Light Gold (#faa31b to #ffe05c). Never invent alternative gradients.

quotes: **Masthead gradient — the gradient to use with the logo mark for contrast; mark sits at the lightest end**
Gradients run horizontally in masthead/banner applications (dark/saturated → light, left → right as shown).

rules.intent: Ensure optimal legibility and contrast of the logo mark on the masthead background.
rules.rule_text: For the masthead background with the logo mark, the horizontal Sunshine to Light Gold gradient (#faa31b to #ffe05c) must be used to ensure correct contrast, and the logo mark must sit at the lightest end (right side).

quotes: Gradients run horizontally in masthead/banner applications (dark/saturated → light, left → right as shown).

rules.intent: Establish consistent gradient reading direction across digital touchpoints.
rules.rule_text: Gradients in masthead and banner applications must run horizontally from dark/saturated on the left to light on the right.
